name: Reliever Flexible Rotation
description: 3-day flexible rotation for relievers with unpredictable usage patterns
notes: Relievers don't follow a fixed schedule. This template provides a 3-day recovery cycle that resets after each game appearance.

day_0.label: Game Day / Appearance Day
day_0.notes: Post-outing recovery only. Stretch, light arm care, hydrate.

day_1.label: Recovery Day

lifting.notes: Blood flow work only. No heavy compounds.

day_1.notes: Easy recovery day. Light arm care, optional light flat ground if arm feels good.

day_2.label: Ready Day

lifting.notes: Full training if no game today. Scale back if game likely.

day_2.notes: Full protocol available. If game is likely today, switch to primer protocol.

game_day_override.label: Pre-Game (if known)
game_day_override.notes: Activation only. Band work, light arm care, mental prep.
